graphEvents.message: design-md-generator in-scope count is 172 excluding node_modules; backend contains 113 files

title: Standalone md-generator artifact writers bypass the central output boundary
claim: preview-gen.ts, proof.ts, and report-gen.ts can write generated artifacts to caller-supplied directories without validating the destination through the central spec-folder/sandbox output policy.
counterevidenceSought: Checked extract.ts and guided-run.ts for equivalent boundary validation; those paths call resolveOutputPath, while the standalone generators import only ensureWritableFile from output-policy.
alternativeExplanation: If direct CLI invocation is unsupported and all calls are guaranteed to flow through guided-run.ts, the guided-run preflight could contain the risk; the standalone require.main entrypoints make that unlikely.
downgradeTrigger: Downgrade or close if direct invocation is made unreachable/unsupported by contract, or if each generator resolves outputDir through requireOutputPath/resolveOutputPath before writes.

subject: design-md-generator sampling
notes: Excluding node_modules, design-md-generator has 172 files and backend has 113; risk remains concentrated in executable backend/scripts.
Wave-level validation deferred; hub and mode structure confirmed.
